channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Georgia is turning to backup Gunner Stockton at quarterback in CFP quarterfinal against Irish
item.description: No. 2 Georgia is resting its national championship hopes on backup quarterback Gunner Stockton following Carson Beck's season-ending elbow surgery on Monday. Coach Kirby Smart said Monday that Georgia is preparing Stockton to start in the Sugar Bowl on Jan.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Houston Astros welcome 1B Christian Walker to team; say negotiations with Bregman stalled
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — The Astros welcomed first baseman Christian Walker to the team Monday, in one of two moves that almost certainly marks the end of Alex Bregman’s time in Houston.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA appealing Pavia injunction as D-I board grants waiver to former JUCO players
item.description: The NCAA appealed Monday the preliminary injunction granted by a U.S. federal judge giving Diego Pavia another year of eligibility even as the organization's Division I board of directors granted a waiver allowing athletes in a similar situation as the Vanderbilt quarterback to play in 2025-26.
item.dc:creator: TERESA M. WALKER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Raiders' Antonio Pierce slams critics who wanted team to lose vs Jaguars, improve draft position
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders head coach Antonio Pierce pushes back against critics who were upset the team won against the Jacksonville Jaguars and hurt their draft position.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texans coach reveals extent of Tank Dell's horrific injury
item.description: Houston Texans head coach DeMeco Ryans revealed the damage that was done to wide receiver Tank Dell in his horrific injury against the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former NFL great Michael Vick introduced as Norfolk State’s football coach
item.description: NORFOLK, Va. (AP) — To shouts of “Coach” and “Let’s go Spartans,” Michael Vick was introduced Monday as Norfolk State’s football coach, a homecoming for the former NFL star and a splashy, attention-grabbing hire for a program that has struggled in recent years.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Report: Eloy Jiménez, former White Sox slugger and top prospect, signs minor-league deal with Rays
item.description: Eloy Jiménez was once one of the top prospects in all of baseball coming up through the White Sox system, regarded as a foundational piece for a core of would-be White Sox future stars. On Monday, he signed a minor-league contract with the Tampa Bay Rays, according to MLB.com.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Matt Petgrave, involved in play that led to Adam Johnson's death, asks for donations for legal costs
item.description: Hockey player Matt Petgrave has called the death of Adam Johnson “a tragic accident” in a public appeal for donations to his legal costs amid a police investigation.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sports teams that were crowned champions in 2024
item.description: Looking back at all of the teams crowned champions during the 2024 season, including the Kansas City Chiefs, Los Angeles Dodgers, Michigan Wolverines and more.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dallas Cowboys make owner Jerry Jones proud after being eliminated from the playoff chase
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — The Dallas Cowboys were officially eliminated from the playoff contention before they kicked off Sunday night. They then went out and made owner Jerry Jones proud, with a 26-24 victory over the playoff-chasing Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bengals fan wins entire stadium free pizza as Cincinnati keeps playoff hopes alive with win over Browns
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals fans walked away from Sunday's game with a win and, thanks to one lucky fan, a slice of free pizza.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: Jessie Bates and Matthew Judon each had a pick-6 to carry Atlanta (8-7) to its second straight win after a four-game losing streak put its postseason hopes in jeopardy.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes throws for TD and runs for score as Chiefs beat Texans 27-19 to close in on No. 1 seed
item.description: Patrick Mahomes knew he could run on the ankle he sprained last week. The bigger concern for the Chiefs quarterback was how he would stop, when all the weight and pressure and momentum would land squarely upon it.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the Yankees agree to a $12.5 million, 1-year deal, AP source says
item.description: First baseman Paul Goldschmidt and the New York Yankees agreed Saturday to a $12.5 million, one-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Guenther scores twice as Utah HC beats Minnesota, 2-1
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is in seventh heaven right about now. Dylan Guenther scored twice, including the game-winner at 10:01 of the third period, as Utah ran its road winning streak to seven in a row Friday night with a hard-fought 2-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Pro pickleball players now earn more than WNBA, NWSL players
item.description: (KRON) -- The pickleball craze that's swept across the Bay Area and nation in recent years has apparently paid off, especially for female athletes. According to the Professional Pickleball Association, pro female players on the PPA Tour earned an average of $260,000 in 2024.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: NCAA president says there are 'less than 10' transgender athletes in college sports
item.description: NCAA President Charlie Baker said it is “debatable” whether transgender women will “always” have a physical advantage over cisgender, or non-transgender, women.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, NewsNation

item.title: Notre Dame and Indiana get 1st taste of playoff football under the Friday night lights
item.description: Notre Dame hasn't made a national championship run since 1988. As for Indiana, the team didn't just win games this season. It dominated opponents.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: White Sox change name of ballpark to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — The Chicago White Sox have changed the name of Guaranteed Rate Field to Rate Field. The name change is because the sponsor of the ballpark, Guaranteed Rate, changed their name to Rate.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa native named starting QB for Atlanta Falcons
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM AP Sports Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5
